gpt_comment: [FULL] All accessible sources align with the baseline for Paris. Meteoblue indicates sunny weather, matching the baseline's lack of rain. Unfortunately, YR.no and Météo France data could not be extracted. It seems like a classic spring day in Paris, perfect for a stroll, perhaps even spotting a bumblebee or two.
